description: Machine-readable quality rubrics. Each criterion has a target score (1-5) and automated check hints.

atomic_design.description: Atoms/molecules/organisms layer boundaries; composition over monoliths

design_tokens.description: All values from tokens; no raw hex or magic numbers anywhere

component_reuse.description: Shared component library, variants via props, no copy-pasted components

spacing_layout.description: Token-based spacing scale, layout primitives, mobile-first breakpoints

typography.description: Defined type scale xs-5xl, no raw font-size, font loading optimized

code_duplication.description: Shared hooks/utils for repeated patterns; near-zero duplication

single_responsibility.description: Logic in hooks, UI in components, API layer separate

source_of_truth.description: Schema-driven types, single config source consumed everywhere

simplicity.description: Minimal indirection, no dead code, naming conveys intent

keyboard_navigation.description: Logical tab order, focus management, skip links, ARIA roles on custom widgets

semantic_html.description: Landmarks, heading hierarchy, alt text, form labels, ARIA

visual_accessibility.description: WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1), 44px touch targets, prefers-reduced-motion

loading_error_states.description: Skeleton screens, contextual error messages, retry buttons

bundle_size.description: Dynamic imports, tree-shaken, per-route budgets, no barrel bloat

rendering_efficiency.description: Proper keys, measured memoization, virtualized long lists

data_fetching.description: SWR/React Query, stale-while-revalidate, prefetching, no waterfalls

core_web_vitals.description: LCP < 2.5s, CLS < 0.1, INP < 200ms, all CWV green

error_handling.description: Error boundaries per feature, structured logging, user-friendly messages

state_management.description: Single store/context per domain, derived state, concurrent-safe updates

edge_cases.description: Empty states handled, boundary values tested, exhaustive switch/case

type_safety.description: Strict mode, no any, discriminated unions, exhaustive narrowing

input_sanitization.description: Framework auto-escaping, parameterized queries, input validation schemas (arktype)

auth_sessions.description: HttpOnly cookies, token refresh, CSRF tokens, role-based access on API routes

dependency_security.description: Automated audit gate in CI, critical CVEs patched within a week

secrets_management.description: Env vars via hosting platform, server-only access, no hardcoded keys
